text:
Healthy Families Sutter County Home Visiting Program | Sutter County, CA
Show/Hide
ROAD CLOSURES
COMMUNITY ACADEMY
Healthy Families Sutter County is an evidence-based home visiting program, accredited by Healthy Families America. We provide voluntary, free services starting during pregnancy or the first few months of a baby's life. Our family support specialists empower parents, offering guidance to nurture their children's social, emotional, and cognitive development.
Eligible Families
must be Sutter County residents, pregnant individuals or parents with an infant under three months old, Medi-Cal eligible, and willing to participate (self-referrals are welcome).
To learn more check out our Healthy Families Sutter County Brochure (
Spanish
,
English
)
Or visit the Healthy Families America website:
Healthy Families America
If you would like to refer yourself or someone else, please call (530) 822-7215 or 1-800-371-3177 or complete the
referral form
and email to
MCAH@co.sutter.ca.us
Program Benefits:
Parenting education and support
Child development guidance
Resources for a healthy pregnancy and early infancy
School Readiness
Mental Health promotion
To learn about the effectiveness of the Healthy Families America program click
HERE
To hear personal stories from families impacted by Healthy Families programs visit
https://www.healthyfamiliesamerica.org/success-stories/
Our Family Support Specialists are trained to provide support with breastfeeding and perinatal mood and anxiety disorders, and are certified in the use of Growing Great Kids Next Generation Prenatal-36 Months Curriculum.
To learn more about the research-based curriculum visit
Great Kids Inc.
